text: 7o seventy so eighty 9o ninety lloo ome(a)hundredl 1o1 one hundred and one 3.序数词：泰示顺序的数词。 1st fistgthninth1i7th seventeenth 21t wenty fist 2nd second ioth tenth18th eightenth 2nd wenty-second 3rd third ith eleventh 1gth nineteeth23d wenty-thid 4th fourth 12th twebtth 20th tmentieth35th+hirty-fifth 5th fifth 13th thirtentth 3oth thirtieth 1o³t one hundred 6h sixth 14th fourteenth 8oth eightieth and first 7h seventh 1sth ftentth qoth ninetieth gth eighth th sixteenth 10oth ome hundredth
1)表示年份：20o2:twenty thousand and t;976:nineten seventy-Six. 2)表示日期：12月1日：Dec.st或 the first of December; 2002年11月8日：Nov.8th，2002.
3)表示时刻：5:15→five fifteon成a quarter past five; 8:30→eight thirty或 half past eight 10:45→ten fory-five或a quarter to eleven
4)表示偏号：Rooml05-→Room oneOfive;Bus No.13→Bus Number Thirtean; P.5→Page Five; Tel.No.7b58b59→Telephone Number seven-six- five-eight-six-five-nine.
5)小数的读法：5.7→five point seven;o.1b→zero point one six. 6)“半”的表达： 112→hal;半小时→halt an hour;1.5小时→one and a hal hours 或 one hour and a halt.
7)序数词前面加the时，表示顺序，加a/an时表示”再一、又一"。如：Thethird lesson is rather difficult.(第=课相当难)/ sholl we read the text a third time?(我们把课文续第三遍，好吗？)
